online.name: Yuyu-tei (遊々亭)
online.notes: Largest JP card shop. Buy/sell prices. Reliable condition grading.

online.name: Card Rush (カードラッシュ)
online.notes: Major JP shop in Akihabara. Good buy prices.

online.name: Mercari JP
online.notes: Secondhand marketplace. Best for real market prices. Sold listings = actual value.

online.name: Yahoo Auctions JP
online.notes: JP auction site. Good for rare cards. Completed auctions = real prices.

online.name: Suruga-ya (駿河屋)
online.notes: Retro/hobby shop. Sometimes has deals on older sets.

online.name: Amazon JP
online.notes: Mixed sellers. Prices vary wildly. Check seller ratings.

online.name: Magi (マギ)
online.notes: Card-specific trading app. Popular in JP TCG community.

online.name: Rakuten
online.notes: Multiple sellers. Points system can make deals better.

physical.name: Hard-Off / Hobby-Off
physical.notes: Recycle shops. Best for finding underpriced cards. Check junk bins.

physical.name: Book-Off
physical.notes: Sometimes has TCG sections. Hit or miss.

physical.name: Flea Markets (フリマ)
physical.notes: Best deals. Sellers often don't know card values.

physical.name: Pokemon Center
physical.notes: MSRP sealed product only. Lottery for popular sets.

physical.name: Card shops (Akihabara/Ikebukuro)
physical.notes: Card Rush, Yellow Submarine, Amenity Dream, etc.

pokemon.name: TCGPlayer
pokemon.notes: Largest US marketplace. Market price = best benchmark for EN cards.

pokemon.name: Cardmarket
pokemon.notes: Largest EU marketplace. Trend price = good benchmark.

pokemon.name: PriceCharting
pokemon.notes: Aggregates sold prices from eBay. Best for historical data.

pokemon.name: eBay
pokemon.notes: Global. Use sold/completed listings for real prices.

pokemon.name: TCGdex
pokemon.notes: Free API. Card data + some pricing. Our current Pokemon data source.

onepiece.name: TCGPlayer
onepiece.notes: Growing OP section. EN cards mainly.

onepiece.name: Cardmarket
onepiece.notes: Good for JP cards sold in EU.

onepiece.name: PriceCharting
onepiece.notes: Separate JP and EN price tracking. Best historical data.

onepiece.name: limitlesstcg
onepiece.notes: Card database with prices. Our current OP data source.

onepiece.name: eBay
onepiece.notes: Best for rare JP cards internationally.
